question: Which counties have the highest number of outages?
What are the top 100 outage records by number of outages?
Which outage records were recorded in 2022?
sparql_query:
PREFIX goo:    <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX dbo:    <https://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX dbr:    <https://dbpedia.org/page/>
PREFIX ma-ont: <http://www.w3.org/ns/ma-ont#>
PREFIX xsd:    <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf:    <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs:   <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?rec ?recordDate ?numOutages
WHERE {
  ?rec a goo:OutageRecord ;
       goo:recordDateTime ?recordDate ;
       goo:numberOfOutages ?numOutages .
  FILTER (YEAR(?recordDate) = 2022)
}

question: Which NTL images represent Orange County, Florida in 2025?
Which county does this outage record represent?
Which county does this NTL image represent?
Which county does this outage map represent?
What is the record date and time of this outage record?
How many outages were recorded in this outage record?
Which NTL image is associated with this outage record?
Which outage map is associated with this outage record?
Which outage map was generated from this NTL image?
Which satellite captured this NTL image?
Which sensor captured this NTL image?
Which outage records in Lee County, Florida had more than 100 outages around Hurricane Ian?
Which NTL images are linked to outage records in Lee County, Florida around Hurricane Ian?
Which outage maps are linked to outage records in Lee County, Florida around Hurricane Ian?
For each county, what is the maximum number of outages recorded?
sparql_query:
PREFIX goo:    <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX dbo:    <https://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX dbr:    <https://dbpedia.org/page/>
PREFIX ma-ont: <http://www.w3.org/ns/ma-ont#>
PREFIX xsd:    <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf:    <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs:   <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?county (MAX(?num) AS ?maxOutages)
WHERE {
  ?rec a goo:OutageRecord ;
       goo:representsCounty ?county ;
       goo:numberOfOutages ?num .
}
GROUP BY ?county
ORDER BY DESC(?maxOutages)

question: Which NTL image and outage map correspond to the highest-outage record for each county?
On what date and time did each county reach its maximum recorded number of outages?
